full_text:
Rui Liang (Wenluan) 芮良 (文鸾)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Rui Liang (芮良), styledWenluan (文鸾), was born in Danyang. Officer under Sun Ce who participated in the Jiangdong campaigns. Died in the late 190’s. Rui Liang was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
